name: ia-first-cde-presentation
description: Estrategia IA First - Centro de Excelencia - Presentación interactiva

scripts.validate: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const h=fs.readFileSync('src/index.html','utf-8'); console.log(h.length + ' bytes generado');"
scripts.serve:open: bash -c 'cd src && python3 -m http.server 8080 & sleep 1; open http://localhost:8080; wait'

author: CDE Team
